Beach club dining for $15-30 a head. At Bãi Khem.

Istanbul Beach Club Phu Quoc sits on one of the island's best beaches and 3,575 people rated it 4.8 stars. The price tag makes zero sense in the best way.

Lunch with your feet near the sand, cold drinks, solid food. No resort markup guilt.
